title: Stuffmod
description: This mod adds lots of cool yet pointless features that can get annoying on servers.Man what was I thinking. It also adds some new things to the end(if you can find it it’s not me it’s your luck)
body:
# The Stuffmod 
Embark on a journey of delightful randomness with the Stuffmod for Minecraft! This mod introduces a collection of quirky and amusing additions that will bring a touch of whimsy to your gameplay experience.
Discover the elusive "eeee Medalion" that, when right-clicked, playfully emits an "e" in the chat. Unearth the three tiers of metal detectors that add a fun twist to your search for valuable resources. Dive into the mysterious "eeee Mabaliean Block," which mimics the amusing behavior of the eeee Medalion.
But that's not all – the End dimension receives a much-anticipated makeover with the addition of Enderite ore. Forge powerful Enderite tools and armor that rival even the mightiest of materials. Delight in the balance of whimsy and strength as you equip yourself with the new Enderite gear alongside the whimsical eeee, emerald, and copper sets.
Unleash your creativity and embrace the whimsical side of Minecraft with the Stuffmod!
## Features:
- Engage with amusing and random elements like the eeee Medalion and eeee Mabaliean Block
- Explore the three tiers of metal detectors for a unique resource-hunting experience
- Dive into the updated End dimension with new ores, tools, and armor sets, including Enderite
- Experiment with diverse tool and armor options, from whimsical eeee gear to formidable Enderite equipment
- New Biomes explore the fantastic new yet wakey things you can finde whilst adventureing

## Why?
There is a hidden item that if you find will make you overpowered

you: 🤓"Ummm isn't that unfair to other player who hasn't discovered it yet?"

## Dont Look At The Code To Find Out The Hidden Items

Even if you do i dont care have fun and enjoy the mod this mod is still in **Beta** so it will still be buggy and have missing textures (I think the texture guy is asleep or somthing🤫)
There is also a realy op dealer from Spokeishere's videos and I hope you try to find it
(Good Luck you'll need it)

## Updating
This mod will be updated to newer version of minecraft when the apropriate documentation comes out

# Anoyingness

- RLCraft:5
